⚔ Energy Duels ⚔

Which energy do you lead from?

Twelve quick duels between your leadership instincts. Each round, two good moves face off — pick the one you'd actually do first. Your choices reveal the energy you reach for most… and the one waiting to be unleashed.

112 duels. A situation, two strong moves. Both could work — choose your genuine first instinct, not the "ideal leader" answer.
2No right answers. Every move is a mature leadership move. There is nothing to win except self-awareness.
3Meet your energy. At the end you'll meet the character you lead from — plus the energy you may need to call on more deliberately.

How duels work

Two moves enter, one comes first. Tap the move you'd genuinely do first. You can change your pick before continuing. Try it:
